summary: Iteration 249 - Campaign Removal Feature Testing. Tested the new ability to remove/archive campaign enrollments from contacts. Fixed a route ordering bug in campaigns.py where list-campaigns endpoint was being matched by the generic /{user_id}/{campaign_id} route. All 8 backend tests pass. Frontend loads correctly and shows campaign removal events in activity feed.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug: list-campaigns endpoint was defined after /{user_id}/{campaign_id}, causing 'list-campaigns' to be parsed as campaign_id. Moved list-campaigns route before the generic route.
Campaign removal endpoint correctly archives enrollment (status='archived'), cancels pending sends, and logs contact_event
Campaign journey endpoint correctly excludes archived enrollments from response
CampaignJourney.tsx component has proper data-testid attributes and trash icon button for removal

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, contacts, contact detail all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign removal feature fully tested and working. Route ordering fix applied to campaigns.py. The list-campaigns endpoint now works correctly. Campaign journey excludes archived enrollments. Activity feed shows 'Campaign Removed' events when campaigns are removed from contacts.

frontend: Campaign Removed event visible in activity feed - PASSED

bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Route ordering issue - the generic /{user_id}/{campaign_id} route was defined before list-campaigns, causing 'list-campaigns' to be parsed as an invalid ObjectId
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved list-campaigns route definition before the generic /{user_id}/{campaign_id} route in campaigns.py
bug_fix_applied.verification: All tests now pass, endpoint returns proper campaign list
